statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".cwd"); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); time=$(date "+%H:%M"); out="\033[36m[$time] $dir\033[0m"; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$branch" ] && branch=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); out="$out \033[3;36m$branch\033[0m"; ahead=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null); behind=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null); untracked=$(git -C "$cwd" ls-files --others --exclude-standard "$cwd" 2>/dev/null | head -1); status=""; if [ "${ahead:-0}" -gt 0 ] && [ "${behind:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then status="⇕⇡${ahead}⇣${behind}"; elif [ "${ahead:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then status="⇡${ahead}"; elif [ "${behind:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then status="⇣${behind}"; fi; [ -n "$untracked" ] && status="${status:+$status }?"; [ -n "$status" ] && out="$out \033[36m$status\033[0m"; main=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null); gitdir=$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-dir 2>/dev/null); [ "$main" != "$gitdir" ] && out="$out \033[36m[worktree]\033[0m"; fi; printf "$out"'
